form.formComment: Racing well. Comes off a 52 day let-up. Last run made some head-way from midfield; finished second in a small field at Kempton Park in the G2 Pendil Novices' Chase on February 21 over 4100m, 6 len behind Jax Junior carrying 70kg at $6.50. Start before won by 2 len Huntingdon in a LR on February 5 over 4000m slow track defeating Piper Park with 71kg at $3.30 in a jumps. Found her best form now. Well-placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Racing well. Comes off a 59 day let-up. Last start finished second in a small field at Wincanton in the LR on February 14 over 3100m, on a wet track; 2.25 len behind Queens Gamble carrying 71kg at $1.30. Before that favourite; tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.0 len Windsor on January 16 over 4000m slow track defeating Largy Force carrying 76kg at $4 in a steeplechase. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 40 days. Last run won by 13 len Haydock Park on March 5 over 4000m defeating Gamesters Guy with 71kg in a steeplechase. Race before finished third in a small field at Huntingdon in the LR on February 5 over 4000m, slow track; 4 len behind Jasmine Bliss carrying 71kg at $6.50. Gets a chance to win. In the mix on current form.

form.formComment: Useful mare. Freshened for 32 days. Last start finished seventh of 8 runners at Cheltenham in the G2 Liberthine Mares' Chase on March 13 over 4100m, 53 len behind Dinoblue carrying 71kg at $34. Before that finished fourth in a small field at Huntingdon in the LR on February 5 over 4000m, slow track; 5 len behind Jasmine Bliss with 71kg at $11. Has been racing well. Has claims with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Suffered interference on the final bend.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after three months finished third in a small field at Stratford-On-Avon on March 28 over 4500m, 10 len behind Tapley with 74.5kg at $3.80. Previously second-up finished fourth in a small field at this track on October 14 over 4290m, 5 len behind Sure Touch with 71kg at $5.50. This no easier and will need to improve further to feature.

form.formComment: Useful mare. Freshened for 39 days. Last run finished second in a small field at Leicester on March 6 over 4000m, a neck behind Taxus Baccata with 77kg at $2.50. Start before made some head-way from midfield; finished second in a small field at Newbury in the LR on January 14 over 4700m, 14 len behind Panic Attack with 71kg at $5.50. Racing well. Makes plenty of appeal on last run and worth following up.

form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Last start finished second in a small field at Bangor-On-Dee on March 21 over 3500m, 1.5 len behind Dj Pete carrying 76kg at $4.50.
